name: Neon Debt
description: Cyberpunk. The netrunner Nyx owes the wrong arcology a great deal of money, and tonight they've sent Kade to collect in person. A rain-slick chase through the Sector 7 sprawl. Original content.
author: Genesis Infinity

effects.name: ICE Shock
effects.description: Black-ICE feedback lances back down the connection into the runner's skull.

effects.name: Reflex Jammed
effects.description: A scrambler spikes the target's wired reflexes, leaving them a half-second slow.

effects.name: Smog Burn
effects.description: Acid smog off the industrial stacks scalds lungs and eyes.

items.name: Stim Patch
items.description: A dermal patch of combat stimulants — closes the gap between hurt and moving.

items.name: Subdermal Plating
items.description: Ceramic weave grafted under the skin — turns blades and softens rounds.

items.name: Monofilament Katana
items.description: A blade honed to a single molecule's edge, humming faintly in the rain.
